should_trigger: Turn this product bet into a Bayesian decision report with priors, evidence quality, posterior updates, action thresholds, the next experiment, and export it as HTML and PDF.
Use a Bayesian workflow to decide whether we should enter this market, including likelihood-ratio updates, sensitivity analysis, and expected value by action.
Assess whether a positive screening test changes risk enough to justify follow-up, keep it in decision-support mode with caveats, and give me a Word report for review.
should_not_trigger: Explain Bayes theorem in simple language.
Solve this textbook probability homework problem.
Give me final investment advice on whether to buy this stock today.
near_neighbor: Brainstorm whether this product direction is good, but do not use Bayesian analysis or produce a decision report.
Summarize the evidence around this medical test without making an explicit action recommendation.
Build a generic forecasting spreadsheet for this business case.
